feed.title: About Currawong Games Interactive
feed.subtitle: Currawong Games Interactive is a father-son indie game studio based in Upper Caboolture, Queensland.

entry.title: About Currawong Games Interactive
entry.summary: Currawong Games Interactive is a father-son indie game studio based in Upper Caboolture, Queensland.
entry.content:
About Currawong Games Interactive

Our Story

Currawong Games Interactive is a father-son indie game studio based in Upper Caboolture, Queensland. We develop story-driven and family-friendly games, interactive narrative experiences, and creator tools — with an Australian flavour. We build for players who want rich, respectful experiences at honest prices. We empower creatives through community participation, tools and transparency.

We offer story-rich, fairly priced games designed for players who value narrative depth, genuine ownership, and experiences worth sharing with the people they love.

  • Casual players looking for relaxed, non-competitive, or story-driven games.
  • Fans looking for rich franchises to become engrossed in.
  • Aspiring game developers, artists, creators with similar passions.
  • Parents/Families sharing games/experiences.

Our Goals

To build a sustainable creative practice that supports our family, advances the craft of interactive storytelling, and gives back to the broader creative community — putting Caboolture on the map along the way.

Inspiration Daniel: I have had a passion to work as an artist making games as far as I can remember. I remember purchasing for a friend the Borderlands Handsome Collection in a sale for $25- two highly acclaimed games and all their add-ons. That moment has stuck with me and permanently shaped how I view the price of games, that is a feeling I want to reciprocate. Ben: I’ve spent 25 years watching the creative industries become increasingly difficult to sustain a career in — for artists, animators, and developers alike. Approaching 50, with a son whose talent and passion for games is undeniable, the question is: why wait for an industry to make room, when we can build something ourselves? The tools and skills to make professional-quality games are more accessible than ever — the barrier now is time, commitment, and courage, not resources. This business is Ben and Daniel backing each other, and demonstrating quietly that a sustainable creative practice built on craft and honesty is possible. Worst case, they'll learn something worth sharing. Vision: A world where great games are within everyone's reach — affordable, welcoming, and worth sharing. We want players to finish a Currawong game and immediately want to tell someone about it. Mission: We are a father-son partnership from Caboolture Australia bringing unique games with an Australian twist. We will make stunning, thought-provoking games and art that respect our players and empower other creators.
